iteration1.changes: Rewrote SKILL.md from base: switched from wttr.in to Open-Meteo API, added city coordinates table, explicit curl commands for all task cities, JSON response parsing guide, WMO weather codes, markdown table output format, and travel/packing section with step-by-step instructions.

iteration2.changes: Expanded travel/packing section with explicit temperature difference format (MUST state X°C/Y°F warmer/cooler), detailed per-city packing list template with 3+ items each, and requirement to reference actual temperature data next to each city.

iteration3.changes: Added sun protection items (sunscreen SPF 30+, sunglasses, hat) explicitly to warm destination packing template, and noted tropical rain showers for umbrella recommendation.
